description: Occurrence data acquisition from GBIF, DataONE, PDFs, literature; source combination

functions.name: get_keys_from_context
functions.description: Look up GBIF taxon keys from taxon names or higher-rank context
functions.scaling_note: GBIF API; fast for small lists

functions.name: fetch_gbif_occurrences
functions.description: Download occurrence records from GBIF for given taxon keys and geometry

output.description: Occurrence records with coordinates, dates, taxonomy, bibliographicCitation

functions.scaling_note: GBIF API; ~1-10 min depending on number of keys and records

functions.name: make_bbox_wkt
functions.description: Create WKT POLYGON string from bounding box coordinates

functions.name: filter_gbif_quality
functions.description: Filter GBIF records by coordinate quality, basis of record, etc.

functions.name: stack_occurrences
functions.description: Row-bind occurrence data frames from multiple sources; attach report_params with citations

inputs.description: One or more occurrence data frames

output.description: Combined occurrence data frame with citations attribute

functions.name: search_literature
functions.description: Search OpenAlex for relevant biodiversity literature by taxa + geography

output.description: Literature search results with screening columns
